_help.mode: 'new' = agents scaffold the folders below · 'existing' = operate on them as-is
_help.services: one entry per FE/BE folder (many allowed). id = short name, side = fe|be, path = relative to THIS file's folder or absolute, stack = framework hint
_help.autonomy: L1 report-only | L2 assisted (no merge) | L3 unattended
